utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好,我今晚想搵套戲睇,需要幫忙。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你想喺戲院睇定租嚟睇?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 咁你今日想搵咩類型嘅戲呀?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想搵有 Tom Hardy 嘅戲。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Tom Hardy,好,其實 Tom Hardy 嘅戲最近好受關注。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 聽落唔錯,可唔可以幫我安排呀?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 喺 Rotten Tomatoes 得到 100 分入面嘅 91 分。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好,搞掂。今晚7點喺 Multiplex 嘅 State Theater 有場。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好,我想搵套戲今晚喺屋企睇。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想睇一套最近出 Blu-ray 嘅科幻片。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 可唔可以畀我多少少資料你個戲?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 有冇特定嘅男演員或女演員?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 可唔可以建議一套出咗 Blu-ray 嘅戲?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好,可唔可以幫我搵套戲喺屋企睇?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好。可唔可以畀我多少少資料你個戲?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好,我諗住搵啲歷史類嘅,但要正面訊息,唔好太沉重。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好,有冇特定嘅女演員或男演員?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好似 Denzel Washington 或者 Russell Crowe 或者 Robert Downey Jr. 噉。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好,可唔可以建議一套戲?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: The Founder 呢套戲好唔好?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好。我可唔可以睇吓預告片?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 可以。等一陣。呢個係 The Founder 嘅預告片。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 睇落唔錯。好多謝你嘅介紹。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好,等我幫你搵今晚緊嘅戲。你想睇咩類型?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你嗰區受歡迎嘅動作片有 American Made、Kingsmen: The Golden Circle 同 Small Moments。點樣幫你揀?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Kingsman circle 係邊個導演㗎?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 抱歉,我暫時唔知點幫你。你可以問片長、劇情或者場次。又或者直接揀一套。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 呢啲戲有冇少過3個鐘嘅?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: American Made 片長1個鐘55分鐘。Kingsman: The Golden Circle 係2個鐘21分鐘,Small Moments 係1個鐘42分鐘。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 抱歉,我暫時唔知點幫你。你可以問評分、片長或者場次。又或者直接揀一套。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 喺 Rotten Tomatoes,Kingsmen: The Golden Circle 得到 50%。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好。我已經將呢個場次嘅資料同買飛方法發送到你手機。享受套戲啦。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 哈囉,我想搵套影評人好推崇嘅戲。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 可唔可以畀我多少少資料你個戲?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好,唔好太新嘅就得,因為我想今晚喺屋企睇。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好似我啱啱睇咗嗰套新戲,我唔記得個名,但係就係嗰啲人縮細咗嘅。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你想用咩平台睇呢套戲?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好,可唔可以畀啲介紹我?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Heat 或者 The Departed 呢套戲好唔好?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好,我想搵套適合小朋友睇嘅戲。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 我可以幫你。你想睇咩類型?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 第二套係 The Jungle Book。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我可唔可以喺 Redbox 租 Frozen?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 等我幫你查吓。等一陣。有,可以喺 Redbox 租到。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好,唔使客氣,拜拜,下次再見。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好,我需要幫手搵套戲去戲院睇。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想知 King Arthur 仲有冇得上?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: King Arthur 淨係喺指定戲院上映。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 冇問題,呢個係 King Arthur 嘅劇情簡介。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 父親被殺之後,年輕嘅 Arthur 個權力慾強嘅叔叔 Vortigern 篡奪王位。佢被奪去繼承權,喺城市後巷艱難長大,唔知自己真正身分。當命運引導佢由石頭度拔出 excalibur 寶劍,Arthur 接受自己真正嘅命運,成為傳奇戰士同領袖。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好,多謝個簡介,聽落唔錯。咁 Washington DC 附近有冇得上?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 睇落 Washington DC 附近有得上。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好,我諗我搵到戲院。今日我想問嘅都問得差唔多,唔該晒。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好,冇問題。提一提你,今晚淨番兩場,祝你有一個愉快嘅夜晚。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好,多謝你提我,我會研究吓呢套戲。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好,我打算今個週末同朋友去睇動作片,我喺 Pasadena, California,近住 Rose Bowl。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好,我可以幫你。等我幫你搵吓你區嘅動作片。等一陣。你區嘅動作片有 The Mummy、Wonder Woman、Pirates of the Caribbean、Alien 同 Guardians of the Galaxy。有冇邊套你同你朋友有興趣?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 最受歡迎嘅兩套係 Guardians of the Galaxy 同 Wonder Woman。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好,我要 Wonder Woman,可唔可以訂聽晚四張飛?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 3D 場次喺下晝4點20分、下晝6點45分同下晝10點。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 已經幫你訂咗聽晚下晝6點45分嘅飛。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想知你可唔可以幫我搵套戲今晚喺屋企睇。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 有冇啲幾新嘅,可能一套政治驚悚片?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 我見到網上經常提到嘅戲有 The Interview、Selma 同其他。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 政治片就有 The Interview、Selma 同 Citizen Four。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好,可唔可以同我講多少少 Citizen Four?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Laura Poitras 收到加密電郵,有人話有政府大規模秘密監控計劃嘅資料,之後佢同記者 Glenn Greenwald 飛咗去香港見嗰個寄件人,原來係 Edward Snowden。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好,完美。你要 HD 定標清?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想搵套適合小朋友睇嘅戲。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好,喺 Xfinity 搵小朋友戲。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Jeffrey Wright、Frances McDormand、Maleah Nipay-Padilla (2015),喺一個友善嘅尼安德特細路(Jack Bright)幫助下,一隻年輕恐龍(Raymond Ochoa)展開一段史詩式冒險,同佢摯愛嘅家人(Jeffrey Wright、Frances McDormand)團聚。詳情。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 呢個係我幫你搵到嘅戲名單:Logan、Deadpool、John Wick 2、Split 同 Get Out。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 係,睇落全部介紹都可以喺 Redbox 搵到。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你可以用1.50蚊租 Logan 嘅 DVD,或者2蚊租 Blu-ray。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 呢啲戲 Redbox 有冇得睇?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 有冇邊套可以喺 Redbox 搵到?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好,你知唔知 Logan 幾錢?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好,我想搵套戲同老公去睇,你可唔可以幫我?我想搵喜劇,我哋要啲嘢笑吓,大約1個半至2個鐘左右。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好,等一陣,我搵到 Jumanji、Welcome to the Jungle、Black Panther、Peter Rabbit。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好,我可唔可以睇 Peter Rabbit 嘅預告片?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 冇問題,PETER RABBIT - 正式預告片。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 呢套睇落幾好,我諗我會去睇,睇落好好笑,好多謝你今日嘅幫忙。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想搵套戲今晚喺屋企睇。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 我有 Indiana Jones and Raiders Of The Lost Ark、Jurassic Park 同 Avatar。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 係,我想搵套好戲今晚睇。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 冇問題,我可以幫你搵。話我知你想睇咩類型?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 目前最top嘅驚悚片有 Solace、Inferno 同 The 9th Life of Louis Drax。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你想我同你講多少少呀?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Tom Hanks 再次飾演哈佛符號學家 Robert Langdon,導演 Ron Howard 同編劇 David Koepp 改編作家 Dan Brown 暢銷小說 Inferno,講 Langdon 用但丁嘅《神曲》做工具,去阻止一場破壞性嘅全球瘟疫。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你想租 DVD 定串流睇?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你可以喺 Google Play、Amazon、Rotten Tomatoes、Hulu 或者 FandangoNOW 串流睇。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你可以喺 Netflix、Redbox 或者你附近嘅 DVD 租舖租呢套戲。想我幫你搵一間嗎?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好,我需要幫手搵套戲喺屋企睇。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 問題少年 Gary(Anthony Michael Hall)同 Wyatt(Ilan Mitchell-Smith)喺電腦度設計佢哋嘅理想女性,一次奇怪嘅電力意外令佢變成真人,就係靚女又超能嘅 Lisa(Kelly LeBrock)。佢幫 Gary 同 Wyatt 著靚衫,畀咗架 Porsche 佢哋驚喜,仲幫佢哋對付衰人 Ian(Robert Downey Jr.)同 Max(Robert Rusler)。但全程,兩個男仔都要向 Wyatt 嗰個惡夢一樣嘅大佬 Chet(Bill Paxton)隱瞞 Lisa 嘅存在。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 呢套聽落唔錯,我可唔可以睇吓預告片?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 呢個係 Weird Science 嘅預告片。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 喂助手,你可唔可以話我知呢套戲幾長?係咪少過2個鐘?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 噢,咁就好喇。你可唔可以話我知 Amazon 有冇得睇?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 噢,咁就完美喇。好,好多謝你今日嘅幫忙。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你幫我搵到套好戲,下次再見。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好,我想同配偶睇套搞笑片。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 畀啲最新最正嘅浪漫喜劇我,唔該。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 畀我睇 Sally Carmichael 嘅預告片。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 可唔可以介紹 We Love You, Sally Carmichael、The Big Sick 同 Paris Can Wait?你想睇邊套?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我要去睇,喺邊度有得上?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 場次喺下晝7點、下晝9點半同下晝10點45分。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你心入面有冇特定嘅戲或者類型?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你附近有幾套喜劇上映,How to be a Latin Lover 今晚下晝7點40分有場。The Boss Baby 下晝7點10分有場,Get Out 就下晝7點50分有場。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: How to Be a Latin Lover 聽落唔錯。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 想我幫你訂飛嗎?喺 Santa Barbara State Street 916 號嘅 Fiesta Five。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好,搞掂晒。仲有冇其他嘢可以幫到你?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 祝你有一個愉快嘅夜晚,享受套戲。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好,等我哋試吓搵今晚緊嘅戲。你想睇咩類型?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你嗰區受歡迎嘅動作片有 American Made、Kingsman: The Golden Circle 同 Small Moments。點樣幫你揀?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 喺 Rotten Tomatoes,American Made 得到 64%,Kingsmen: The Golden Circle 得到 50%,Small Moments 得到 98%。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: American Made 喺 Alameda Theater 上映。今日有幾場,下一場喺下晝9點24分,啱唔啱你?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好!我已經將呢個場次嘅資料發送到你手機,仲有買飛方法。享受套戲啦!

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你好用戶,有咩可以幫到你?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 可唔可以同我講多少少呢套戲?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Wonder Woman 評級 PG-13,片長2個鐘21分鐘,粉絲評分四個半星,Rotten Tomatoes 評分 92%。呢個係劇情簡介:一個亞馬遜公主(Gal Gadot)原本喺只有女戰士嘅島上過住悠閒生活,直到一個機師(Chris Pine)喺附近墜機。救咗佢之後,佢知道第一次世界大戰正吞噬地球,發誓要用超能力恢復和平。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我唔喺 Davis,我喺 Glendale, Arizona。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你附近戲院 Wonder Woman 嘅場次係下晝3點45分、下晝7點15分同下晝10點35分,邊個時間啱你?要我幫你訂幾多張飛?如果需要長者或者12歲以下小童飛請話我知。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我暫時唔想訂飛,資料已經夠,唔該。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 動作片,最好有 Johnny Depp,而且最近票房好成功嘅。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 可唔可以幫我搵吓,唔該?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 其實 Johnny Depp 有份主演 Pirates of the Caribbean 同 Dead Men Tell No Tales。呢兩套戲而家緊。兩套戲 IMDb 評分大約 7.0 分(滿分10分),片長2個鐘33分鐘。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Pirates of the Caribbean 有冇 IMAX 或者 3D 場?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我可唔可以要下晝8點半兩張飛?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 下晝8點半同下晝10點20分有場。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 係,下晝8點半兩張飛20蚊,搞掂晒。享受你喺 Edwards Boise Stadium 21 & IMAX 嘅戲。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好,我喺 Seattle University of Washington 附近,今晚想睇動作片。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好,我想租套戲,想搵人幫手搵。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我對影評人最愛嘅片有興趣。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 冇,畀我睇吓你有咩紀錄片。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 我搵到 An Inconvenient Truth、Step 或者 Turn It Around。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我未睇過 An Inconvenient Truth,我知續集就出,聽落幾有希望。Google Play 有冇得睇?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好,我諗咁就啱喇,多謝你嘅幫忙。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好,我見到你喺 Davis,係咪想我喺嗰度搵戲院?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你知唔知想睇邊套,定係想我幫你揀?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 等我幫你睇吓,有 Guardians of the Galaxy,係有動作嘅喜劇。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 有下晝7點15分同下晝10點半場。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好,喺 Regal Davis Holiday theater。要唔要地址?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 祝你有一個愉快嘅一日,享受套戲。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好,我想搵套戲同小朋友一齊睇。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 同小朋友睇嘅戲,冇問題。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Paddington 2 可能係你最好嘅選擇。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 真㗎?好。可唔可以話我知場次?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好,場次係下晝4點50分、下晝7點25分同下晝10點10分。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我會去下晝7點25分嗰場,因為下晝10點10分太夜。呢套戲有冇預告片?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好,聽到都好,呢套戲冇預告片。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 想去 Casino theater 睇戲。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好選擇,而家有幾套喜劇上映,你有冇特定要求,等我哋可以縮窄選擇?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Monster Trucks 有 3D 版,喺 AMC Saratoga 下晝6點05分有場。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 為咗逃離自己出生嘅生活同小鎮,中學生 Tripp(Lucas Till)用報廢車零件砌咗架怪獸車。附近一個鑽油站嘅意外,令一隻地下生物流離失所,佢有速度嘅口味同天賦,Tripp 可能搵到離開小鎮嘅關鍵同一個最意想不到嘅朋友。結合尖端視覺效果同最先進嘅 CGI,Monster Trucks 係一套適合全家嘅動作冒險片,會令你坐立難安,最後仲會觸動你嘅心。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好,我今日需要幫手搵套戲去租,我想搵劇情片。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 冇問題,我可以幫你搵租嘅戲。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 係,其實我想搵最近嘅戲。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好,我會搵近期嘅劇情片。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 最top嘅戲有 The Great Wall、50 Shades Darker、The Shock 同 A Dog's Purpose,邊套吸引你,定係我繼續列落去?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 仲有 Hidden Figures、La La Land、Underworld Blood Wars、Passengers 同 The Space Between Us。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 其實,Passengers 係我一直想睇嘅戲,租幾多錢?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好!我已經透過 Google Play 幫你搞掂。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好,我喺 Davis, California,我想知你可唔可以幫我搵套戲今晚睇。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 我可以幫你,你想睇咩類型嘅戲?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 啲有趣嘅,可能動畫,係畀小朋友睇嘅。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 目前最推薦畀小朋友嘅戲有 Ferdinand、Star Wars The Last Jedi、Justice League 同 Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 可唔可以同我講多少少 Jumanji?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 四個青少年留堂時發現一個90年代嘅神秘電子遊戲,嘗試玩的時候被吸咗入虛擬叢林。佢哋變成唔同嘅遊戲角色:一個型爆探險家(Dwayne Johnson)、一個聰明動物學家(Kevin Hart)、一個戰士辣妹(Karen Gillan)同一個肥教授(Jack Black),呢班人要穿越呢個奇異嘅新世界先可以生存。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好,聽落唔錯,7點或者之前有冇場?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 淨係得下晝3點20分、下晝6點30分同下晝9點40分。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好,下晝6點30分嗰場喺邊度?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 下晝6點30分嗰場喺 Regal Davis Stadium 5。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好,可唔可以幫我買三張飛?兩張小童,一張大人。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 兩張小童飛同一張大人飛已經買咗,透過電郵發送畀你。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想你幫我搵套戲今晚喺屋企睇。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想睇女主角嘅懸疑片。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你心入面有冇特定女演員?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好,部分最高評分、女主角嘅懸疑片有 Gone Girl、Winter's Bone 同 Sleeping with the Enemy。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Winter's Bone 喺 Redbox 有冇得租?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好助手,我想要一套好似 A Nightmare on Elm Street 嘅戲。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想要好似 A Nightmare on Elm Street 嘅戲,我比較想喺 Redbox 睇戲。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你有冇聽過 The Shining、Halloween 或者 Scream?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 嗰三套係同期出、評價好高嘅恐怖片。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 唔使客氣,喺最近你嘅 Redbox 搵到,祝你有一個愉快嘅夜晚。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你都有愉快嘅夜晚,拜拜。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 而家有 Guardians of the Galaxy、Pirates of the Caribbean 同 Alien。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 我見到你喺 Davis California,你要唔要我喺嗰頭搵戲院?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Regal Davis Holiday 6 theater 有下晝7點45分同下晝10點50分場。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你要幾多張飛?等我睇吓有冇。Aliens 下晝10點45分場有10張飛,你要唔要我幫你留?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 訂飛完成,你要唔要地址?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 祝你有一個愉快嘅一日,享受套戲。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你好,今日有咩可以幫到你?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好,我需要幫手搵套戲去戲院睇,我而家喺 Pasadena California 近住 Rose Bowl。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我諗我想睇 King Arthur,如果有的話。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Pirates of the Caribbean 係唯一緊嘅戲。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 我見到下晝5點25分、下晝7點15分同下晝8點30分有場。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 我會買飛,將資訊發送到你電郵。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 今日冇喇,就係咁多,多謝你今日嘅幫忙,希望你有一個愉快嘅一日。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想搵人幫手搵套戲今晚喺屋企睇。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好,我有幾個建議,Bridesmaids、Mean Girls 或者 Legally Blonde 好唔好?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Bridesmaids、Mean Girls 或者 Legally Blonde 好唔好?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Mean Girls 喺 iTunes 有冇得睇?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 有,Mean Girls 喺 iTunes 有得睇。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 詳情已發送到你電郵,唔該。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好,我喺 Davis, California,我今晚想睇戲。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想睇喜劇,想睇好似 Seth Rogen 或者 Judd Apatow 嘅喜劇,唔一定係嗰個導演,但係想要類似嘅。可唔可以話我知你而家有咩?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 我冇符合你要求嘅戲,可唔可以建議一套?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想睇嗰套,畀我三張飛。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好,搞掂,我幫你訂咗三張飛。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 可以,發送到你手機,享受套戲。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 哈囉,我今晚想喺屋企租套戲睇,我冇咩時間,所以想搵套少過2個鐘、短啲嘅戲。我想搵驚悚片,新出嘅就最好,有女主角就完美,不過唔係必須。你可唔可以幫我?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 呢套叫 Split 嘅驚悚片,Betty Buckley 擔正做一個受信賴嘅精神科醫生。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 正,聽落唔錯,係咪 James McAvoy 嗰套?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好,完美,啱啱好少過,好,我最後一個問題,呢套戲 iTunes 有冇得租?可以的話我想用呢個方法租。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 有,呢套戲可以喺 iTunes 用4.99蚊租到。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好,完美,聽落係一個好好嘅夜晚節目,好多謝你嘅幫忙。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好,我想搵影評人最愛嘅戲。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好,我可以幫你搵戲,等一陣。呢個係我搵到嘅戲名單:Resident Evil the Final Chapter、Logan、Rogue One a Star Wars Story、La La Land、Hidden Figures、Get Out、Split、Lion 同 The Founder。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 呢啲戲有冇邊套有 Denzel Washington?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 等我幫你查吓,等一陣,呢啲戲都冇 Denzel Washington。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 有冇 Denzel Washington 嘅戲?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 等我幫你查吓,等一陣,睇落我搵到 Glory。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Glory 其實分類做劇情片。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 等我幫你查吓,等一陣,有,Glory 喺 iTunes 有,12.99蚊。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 完美,咁就夠喇,好多謝你嘅幫忙。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 唔使客氣,下次再見,拜拜。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想搵人幫手搵套戲喺屋企睇。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好,有幾套 Christopher Lee 嘅戲。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Taste the Blood of Dracula 好唔好?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你有冇 Redbox 有得租嘅戲?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 有 Bornless Ones、The Mummy、The Bye Bye Man 同 The Evil Exorcism。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 喺 La Jolla, California,列畀我 Bruce Willis 主演嘅戲嘅日場票價。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 係,不過我搵唔到 Bruce Willis 嘅戲。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 沙灘飛 Wonder Woman 12.79蚊,下晝8點45分或者下晝10點15分開場。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 祝你有一日愉快嘅日子,再見。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好,我想搵套少過2個鐘嘅戲。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好,我諗吓,我最鍾意嘅戲係 Raging Bull,類似嘅就幾好,我最鍾意嘅演員係 Brad Pitt,嗰類類型同嗰個演員嘅就得。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好,冇問題,目前有幾套好戲上映,你有冇聽過 When We Were Kings?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 目前有幾套好戲上映,你有冇聽過 When We Were Kings?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你有冇其他 Redbox 有得租嘅選擇?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 喺 YouTube、Netflix、Amazon,當然仲有 Google Play。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好,可惜我想用 Redbox,所以你有冇其他符合、Redbox 有嘅建議?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 有,其實叫 Rocky 嘅戲而家喺 Redbox 有。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想搵人幫手搵套戲去戲院睇。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 我搵到 Resident Evil the Final Chapter

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好,聽落唔錯,下晝5點之後仲有冇場?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 有,Century 20 Great Mall 下晝9點50分有場。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好,聽落唔錯,好多謝你嘅幫忙,拜拜。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好,我今晚想睇戲,我喺 Seattle,University of Washington 附近。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 我可以幫你,你想睇咩類型嘅戲?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想睇劇情片,有咩新嘅劇情片?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 有 Tubelight、The Book of Henry 同 All Eyes on Me。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我對 The Book of Henry 有興趣,可唔可以同我講多少少?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 冇問題,呢個係劇情簡介。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Henry 係佢崇拜嘅細佬嘅守護者,又係媽媽嘅不懈支持者,佢好似彗星咁飛速過日子。Susan 發現隔離屋有個危險秘密,而 Henry 諗咗一個驚人嘅計劃去幫手。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好,我對呢套有興趣,話我知幾時可以去睇。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 睇落下一場係今晚下晝6點05分。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 我可以幫你,我會發送到你電郵,享受套戲。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好,我想喺戲院搵套戲,我喺 Seattle University of Washington 附近。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想搵動作片,受歡迎嘅動作片。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Kingsman、Logan Lucky 或者 American Assassin 好唔好?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好,Kingsman 聽落唔錯,我可唔可以睇預告片?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好,係,我想睇呢套,睇落唔錯,好多謝你。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 1張飛去 AMC Dine-In Seattle 下晝7點。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 冇問題,我可以幫你,呢個係附近三套受歡迎嘅戲嘅名單。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 第一,The Lego Batman Movie,票房冠軍,接住 John Wick: Chapter 2,好受歡迎,然後 Arrival,一套受歡迎嘅科幻驚悚片,有冇邊套你有興趣?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好,咁你想睇 Arrival,有冇特定時間?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 套戲下晝4點45分或者下晝7點40分有場,邊個啱你?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好,我可以喺 AMC Van Ness theater 幫你訂飛。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 我而家發資訊畀你,仲有冇其他嘢想知道?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好,我想搵套 PG-13 嘅動畫片,Netflix 有得睇嘅。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 呢個係我幫你搵到嘅幾套戲,有 Minions、Kubo 同 Sausage Party。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你可唔可以發 Minions 嘅預告片畀我?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 呢個係 Minions 嘅預告片,睇吓啦。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好,正,呢套就係我想睇嘅,可唔可以發條連結畀我?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 我已經發送到你電郵,去睇吓你電郵,享受套戲。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好,我想租套票房冠軍嘅紀錄片。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 呢個係幾個,Inside Job、Citizen Four、Blackfish 或者 Amy。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 第一套 Xfinity 有冇得睇?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 冇,YouTube、Google Play 或者 Amazon 就有。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好,我想搵人幫手安排今晚睇戲,我喺 New York City Times Square 附近。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 等一陣,New Hamsterdam theater、Minskoff Theatre 或者 Shubert Theater。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: New Hamsterdam theater、Minskoff Theatre 或者 Shubert Theater。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好,我想搵 Rotten Tomatoes 70分或以上嘅劇情片。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Lady Bird 或者 Murder on the Orient Express。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 同我講吓 Lady Bird 呀,唔該。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Marion McPherson,一個 California 護士,丈夫失業之後努力維持生計,佢同一個同佢一樣充滿愛、意志堅定、意見多多嘅青少年女兒維持住一段波動嘅關係。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 嗯,聽落有啲沉重,我諗我要 Murder on the Orient Express,對於被殺嗰個人嚟講都幾沉重,不過除咗嗰樣,聽落都幾過癮,9點左右有冇場?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好,可唔可以幫我訂兩張飛?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 可唔可以幫我訂兩張飛?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想搵人幫手搵套戲同朋友睇。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好,搜尋緊近期嘅戲,等一陣。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 係咪我要喺 Malibu, California 搵戲院?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 係,喺 1500 N. Shoreline Blvd, Mountain View, CA 94043 有得上。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好,祝你有一日愉快嘅日子。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我係 Billy Crystal 嘅超級擁躉。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: When Harry Met Sally、Monsters Inc.、Monsters University、City Slickers、Analyze This、The Princess Bride、Parental Guidance 同 Analyze That。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 唔使,呢啲 Hulu Plus 有冇得睇?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 睇落 Forget Paris 係唯一一套。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好,咁我要呢套,多謝你嘅幫忙。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好,我想搵套戲今晚喺屋企睇。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 係,我想搵劇情片,要根據真人真事改編嘅。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 根據真人真事改編嘅劇情片,有冇特定年代?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好,我可唔可以睇預告片?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 呢個係 The Godfather 1972年嘅預告片。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好,呢套 Amazon 有冇得睇?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好,冇所謂,咁我要呢套,唔該。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好,我想下個星期二喺 Santa Barbara 睇戲,可唔可以幫我?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想搵好嘅得獎紀錄片。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 我有技術問題,抱歉,我幫唔到你。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我喺 New York City Times Square 附近,我需要幫手搵套戲睇,唔該。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 我可以幫你,你今晚有興趣睇咩類型?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我有興趣睇有劇情嘅歌舞片。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 目前最top嘅兩套歌舞片有 The Greatest Showman 同 Coco。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想睇 The Greatest Showman,係咪 Hugh Jackman 嗰套?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 冇錯,Hugh Jackman 係男主角。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 聽落幾有趣,我可唔可以睇預告片,唔該?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 真係幾有趣,我要買飛,唔該。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你想睇下晝7點半定下晝10點40分嗰場?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 買咗一張飛,透過電郵發送畀你,享受套戲,祝你有一個愉快嘅夜晚。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好多謝你嘅幫忙,好感激。
